title: cissampelopsis glandulosa
intro: Cissampelopsis glandulosa, also known as Chinese aster or glandular cissampelopsis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Cissampelopsis glandulosa include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, as well as its potential to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Cissampelopsis glandulosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
